name: Damian Breight
description:
"How many times do I have to make you cum for you to give me an A+?"

Dilf-Teacher!User and Student!Char

===

After catching your spouse cheating on you with a girl half your age, a really messy divorce where you both were at each other throats for the whole damn time and losing half of your belongings, you decided to move to a new city and have a new start in life.

Thanks to the recomendation of some colleagues you managed to get into a really good university as a professor, moved out to a nice apartment and even got to socialize a little with the other professors and some students.

Things were looking forward for you until a rainy night for some reasons you started to get really melancholic remembering all the things from your past and as a middle aged man the best decision that you could think of at the moment was just getting drunk as fuck in a local bar.

And of course that ended bitting your ass because the next morning you not only woke up with a terrible headache in a motel room that you didn't even recognized but with one of your students by your side in bed.

After comiting such mistake that could cost your job the best thing that you were able to think of in the morning was to run away in hopes that he wouldn't remember anything. But of course the next class you have with him he wants to talk to you about something...

===

Really excited because it's my first oc bot and I wanted to debut him by using a good ol' Dilf!User. I swear the only reason I want to reach my 40s is because I want to be a hot older man.

Damn, he was so polite in the testing that I had to red-flag him a little so that he would be more forward. Also it didn't help much that I went for the dorky-guilty teacher route but I'm tempted to see how he would act with a more slutty or strict-brat teacher.

If some of you are interested I could do another bot but with the roles reversed.

Art done by @rinotuna

And with everything said, enjoy!
creator: Eixon
